case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. ANGEL DAVID MERCADO RAMOS

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. APPEARED, REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ANGEL DAVID MERCADO RAMOS. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE SYLVIA HUSING, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-04-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-08-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES, IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APEAR AS TO [VERONICA ROSALES] WAS PREVIOUSLY FILED ON MAY 24, 2024. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER DISMISSED AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF WITHOUT PREJUDICE.
